title: How Mettl's 360 Degree Performance Appraisals & Feedback Tool Works
text:
Mettl 360View\> How It Works?

![]()

## Mettl 360View: How It Works?

[](/signup/)

CREATE

MANAGE

GIVE FEEDBACK

REPORTS

360 Part 1

## Step 1: Create Survey

* **1.1 Select Template :** You can select **Custom Survey Template** or request as per your organizational needs from Mettl’s pre-built test repository
 
* **1.2 Add Participants :** You can **upload participant’s data in bulk** using excel template, and if you make any errors, 360 View smartly detects and rectifies them
 
* **1.3 Set-Up E-mails :** You can customize template and **set-up automated reminders.** And if there is a failed delivery, 360View informs you automatically
 

360 Part 2

## Step 2: Manage Survey

* Click on the **survey tile** to see detailed survey status
 
* On the survey details page, you can **track status** of all respondents, add more participants, send ad-hoc reminders and do much more
 

360 Part 3

## Step 3: Give Feedback

* Participants receive an e-mail link from where they can **‘Give Feedback’** to the people listed
 
* They can fill survey in multiple sittings, as 360View provides the functionality of automatically saving the responses
 

360 Part 4

## Step 4: Analyze & Access the Report

They can fill the survey in multiple sittings, as 360View provides the functionality of automatically saving the responses

* a) Number of Feedback Providers
 
* b) Competency Wise Ratings
 
* c) Summary of Top Qualities and Areas of Improvement
 
* d) Others Opinion About the Seeker
 
* e) Suggested Personal Development Plan
 

* * *
